query:
CREATE TABLE `push_subscriptions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`endpoint` text NOT NULL,
	`p256dh` text NOT NULL,
	`auth` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`userAgent` varchar(512),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `push_subscriptions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Go42u5Huy3hW8J.c14611683c97 --database Hwkz9ewQw48rtHqsLPREaH --execute CREATE TABLE `push_subscriptions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`endpoint` text NOT NULL,
	`p256dh` text NOT NULL,
	`auth` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`userAgent` varchar(512),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `push_subscriptions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
